source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for clear English planner UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for calm Japanese labels, compact dates, and flowing hierarchy.
layout: Fluid 8px planning grids, slender branch dividers, leaf-strand rhythm, soft shadows, and riverside spacing.

prompts.label: Transparent willow branch motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Willow transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a riverside willow branch botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A graceful drooping willow branch with narrow lance-shaped sage-green leaves, pale young leaf undersides, slim flexible bark-grey twigs, subtle river-blue cool highlights, and natural alternating leaf clusters. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, airy hanging silhouette, no cattails, no bamboo.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include one arcing branch and several pendant leaf strands without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no reed plumes, no bamboo segments, no eucalyptus coins, no flower blossoms, no landscape, no river scene, no vase, no hand, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Willow light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Willow", derived from the visible riverside willow branch cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible flowing planner system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Willow, Willow Branch, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from sage-green willow leaves, young leaf highlights, bark-grey twigs, cool river-blue accents, pale river mist surfaces, moss success states, and silt depth. The board must read as willow, not reed, bamboo, eucalyptus, or generic green UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, planner timeline, line chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, river-mist backgrounds, willow-sage primary actions, river-blue focus rings, bark-grey dividers, pendant leaf-line navigation, soft elongated shadows, subtle narrow-leaf texture.
Constraints: no reed plume silhouettes, no bamboo nodes, no eucalyptus round leaves, no generic purple/blue gradients, no saturated tropical palette, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Willow", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Willow dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Willow". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible riverside willow branch cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Willow, Willow Branch, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the willow system language: deep wet-bark backgrounds, pale mist text, willow-sage active states, river-blue focus and chart accents, moss success, bark-grey borders, pendant leaf-line dividers, soft 8px shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as willow, not reed, bamboo, eucalyptus, or generic forest.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, planner timeline, line chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: wet-bark dark surfaces, river-mist foreground, willow-sage controls, river-blue chart highlights, bark-grey separators, subtle narrow-leaf texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no reed plumes, no bamboo nodes, no eucalyptus round leaves, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Willow".
